## Test plan

- [ ] `go test ./...` or `go test -short ./...`
- [ ] `go vet ./...`
- [ ] `golangci-lint run ./...` (or `make validate`)
- [ ] `go mod tidy` (no diff)

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets added
- [ ] Public API / behavior preserved (or migration documented)
- [ ] Docs updated if needed
